paper-entry.title: ImageNet: A Large-Scale Hierarchical Image Database, Deng+, CVPR'09
paper-entry.tags: ComputerVision, Dataset, Selected Papers/Blogs, ImageClassification, ObjectRecognition, ObjectLocalization
paper-entry.issue-body: ## URL - https://www.image-net.org/static_files/papers/imagenet_cvpr09.pdf ## Authors: - Jia Deng - Wei Dong - Richard Socher - Li-Jia Li - Kai Li - Li Fei-Fei
